appDesc.message: Snap a region, add a box or a quick note, copy to clipboard. No account, no cloud.

actionTitle.message: SnapJot: Capture (click, then drag a region)

restrictedPage.message:
SnapJot: This page can't be captured.
(chrome:// pages and the Chrome Web Store are restricted.)
Try it on a normal web page.

hintSelect.message: Drag to select an area  ·  Enter for full screen  ·  Esc to cancel

copyTitle.message: Copy to clipboard — paste with Cmd/Ctrl+V

copyFellBack.message: Clipboard blocked — saved as PNG instead
